entries.title: Removing brick edging and onion grass
entries.body: Early-stage site preparation. New soil will be imported and machinery sourced for the remaining removal work. For now, onion grass is being cleared manually by hand.

entries.title: Bulbs lifted and heeled in
entries.body: Removed the existing bulbs from the bed and relocated them to a holding spot on site, ready for replanting once the new layout goes in.

entries.title: Skip bin delivered
entries.body: Accepted delivery of a 6m³ skip bin on site for the removal waste.

entries.title: Mini loader booked
entries.body: Booked a mini loader for hire, available from next Tuesday (7 July), to move through the remaining removal work.
